emails.subject: Actuals
emails.body: Actuals What is the latest actuals that I have for month to date. West Gas orig and West Gas Denver orig. BT

emails.subject: RE: Actuals
emails.body: RE: Actuals Barry, I will have September actuals ready on Wednesday. Let me know if you want to meet then to discuss. Also, Louise has reviewed the headcount plan submitted for 2002 and asked that we reduce the West Origination count by one. The attached file shows what was initially submitted. If you will let me know what position to eliminate, I will make the necessary adjustments. Thanks, Laynie x3-3131 To: East, Laynie

emails.subject: RE: Actuals
emails.body: just give me a call and we can set up a time. BT To: Tycholiz, Barry

emails.subject: Actuals
emails.body: Actuals Let's try to get together today. BT

emails.subject: RE: Actuals
emails.body: RE: Actuals Barry I'm not in the office today (logging in from home) but will be in tomorrow. I'm free all day so let me know what time is best for you.

emails.subject: RE: Actuals
emails.body: I am out of town tues, weds.. pls schedule for some time on thurs. BT
